name: Mariya Benny
title: Full-Stack Developer & AI Enthusiast
bio: Computer Science & Engineering student specializing in building robust web applications with Python, JavaScript, and modern frontend frameworks. Passionate about AI integration and sleek, functional UI/UX design.

projects.title: EliteBoard
projects.description: A secure, Kanban-style task management platform featuring role-based access control and simulated two-factor authentication.

projects.title: AI Construction Auditor
projects.description: An intelligent fraud detection layer that cross-references real-time material consumption against a dynamic rate ledger.

projects.title: The Communication Lab
projects.description: An e-learning module designed to gamify soft-skills development using the structured CLEAR communication framework.
